sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
2. any prominence or projection; as of a mountain

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Perhaps from G3700 (through the idea of the shading or proximity to the organ of vision); the eye “brow” or forehead, that is, (figuratively) the brink of a precipice: - brow.
